original: Created in joint venture between JoyCo and Xenogen to help their scientists on important projects, Focus Pills give you a momentary sense of calm and emotionless insight. Reduces active lust, and grants a short-term bonus to Intelligence.

original: You pop a Focus Pill into your mouth. As it dissolves, you start to feel a little calmer and more focused in on the task at hand.
context: <<POS:06423845>> combatOutput("You pop a Focus Pill into your mouth. As it dissolves, you start to feel a little calmer and more focused in on the task at hand.",null,e)

original: You pop a Focus Pill out of your pack and into your mouth. It’s completely tasteless, and all but dissolves in your mouth.\n\nAfter a moment’s wait, you start to feel a little calmer. You let out a breath you didn’t know you were holding, and focus in on the task at hand.
context: <<POS:06423992>> output("You pop a Focus Pill out of your pack and into your mouth. It’s completely tasteless, and all but dissolves in your mouth.\n\nAfter a moment’s wait, you start to feel a little calmer. You let out a breath you didn’t know you were holding, and focus in on the task at hand.")
